description: This file defines the NotesRepository class for managing Note objects, including listing, creating, updating, deleting, and syncing notes between local database and remote API.

classes.name: NotesRepository
classes.description: Repository class providing methods for managing notes, including CRUD operations and synchronization between local and remote sources.

methods.name: listNotes
methods.description: Retrieves a list of notes for a given user and query from the local database.

methods.name: listTags
methods.description: Retrieves all tags associated with notes for a user.

methods.name: createNote
methods.description: Creates a new note locally and attempts to sync it with the remote server.

methods.name: updateNote
methods.description: Updates an existing note locally and attempts to sync the changes with the remote server.

methods.name: deleteNote
methods.description: Marks a note as deleted locally and schedules a remote sync.

methods.name: _bestEffortSync
methods.description: Attempts to synchronize a note with the remote API, handling exceptions and logging outcomes.
